_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Failure to pass meconium in first 24-48 hours of life after confirmation of patent anus

preauth.label: X Ray abdomen / USG Abdomen / Dye test / sigmoidoscopy / colonoscopy

claim.label: Histopathology examination report (within 7 days of discharge)

ppd_preauth.q: Clinical notes - detailed history, signs & symptoms, indication for procedure?
Investigations X Ray abdomen / USG Abdomen / Dye test / sigmoidoscopy / colonoscopy?

cpd_claim.q: Are the detailed ICPs with daily vitals and line of treatment?
Are the detailed procedure / Operative Notes available?
Is the Discharge summary with follow-up advise at the time of discharge?
Was the Histopathology report available (within 7 days of discharge)?

common_queries: Patient not a diagnosed and confirmed case of Hirschsprung disease based on clinical features and biopsy
X-ray erect abdomen / dye test / sigmoidoscopy / colonoscopy did not confirm dilated colonic loops
Histopathology report of resected tissue did not confirm Hirschsprung's Disease
Clinical notes missing or incomplete at pre-authorization
Investigation reports (X Ray abdomen / USG Abdomen / Dye test / sigmoidoscopy / colonoscopy) missing or inconclusive at pre-authorization
Histopathology examination report not submitted within 7 days of discharge for claim

clinical_key_pointers: Failure to pass meconium in first 24-48 hours of life after confirmation of patent anus
